title: b8853
description: [SYCL] Fix reorder MMVQ assert on unaligned vocab sizes ( #22035 ) [SYCL] Fix reorder MMVQ assert on unaligned vocab sizes The reorder mul_mat_vec_q dispatchers for Q4_0, Q8_0, Q4_K, and Q6_K asserted that block_num_y was a multiple of 16 subgroups. Models with a vocab size not divisible by 16 (for example HY-MT at 120818) aborted on model load when the output projection tripped the assert. I replaced the assert with padding: block_num_y now rounds up to a whole number of subgroup-sized workgrou
